panel.title: Git Companion
panel.auth-error: Please authenticate to use this plugin, using {bin} auth login
panel.bin-not-installed: {bin} is not installed. Please install it to use this plugin.
panel.no-scope: Set a Group or Repository in Settings to view items assigned to you.

platform.desc: Choose your git platform (Gitlab or Github).
platform.label: Platform

refreshInterval.desc: How often to refresh data, in seconds.
refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval (s)

repo.label: Repository
repo.desc: Restrict to a specific repository (e.g. owner/repo). Leave empty to use Group.

group.label: Group
group.desc: GitLab group slug. Takes precedence over Repository when set.

org.label: Organization
org.desc: GitHub organization. Leave empty to search globally across all your repos.
